summary.lv: Intrum Global Technologies meklē Senior Technical Engineer tīklu jomā, kas nodrošinās uzņēmuma tīkla infrastruktūras stabilitāti, risinās incidentus un vadīs tehniskus uzlabojumus hibrīda darba modelī Rīgā.
summary.en: Intrum Global Technologies is looking for a Senior Technical Engineer specialising in networks to maintain enterprise network infrastructure stability, resolve complex incidents, and lead technical improvements in a hybrid work model in Riga.
